Title: Verify successful registration as a Customer
Preconditions:
- User is on the registration page.
- System is online and accepting new registrations.
Test Data:
- First Name: "Mario"
- Last Name: "Rossi"
- Email: "mario.rossi@example.com"
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Confirm Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Is Seller: Unchecked (default: false)
Test Steps:
1. Enter the provided test data into the registration form.
2. Click the "Register" button.
3. Verify the system redirects to the login page or dashboard.
Expected Result:
- User account is created with `isVenditore = false`.
- Email field is validated as unique (no duplicate allowed).
- Password is hashed and stored securely.
- `getNome()`, `getCognome()`, and `getEmail()` return correct values.

Title: Verify registration failure with invalid email format
Preconditions: - User is on the registration page.
Test Data:
- First Name: "Luigi"
- Last Name: "Bianchi"
- Email: "invalid-email" (missing @ and domain)
- Password: "Pass123"
Test Steps:
1. Enter the provided test data.
2. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid email format."
- User account is **not** created.
- Form fields remain populated for correction.

Title: Verify successful login as a Seller
Test Steps:
1. Enter credentials on the login page.
2. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the **seller dashboard**.
- `getNomeNegozio()` and `getIndirizzo()` are accessible (if set).
- Session is created with `isVenditore = true`.

Title: Verify successful product addition by a Seller
Preconditions:
- Seller is logged in (`isVenditore = true`).
- "+" button is visible on the seller dashboard.
Test Data:
- Product Name: "Organic Apples"
- Category: "Fruits"
- Price: 2.99
- Description: "Freshly harvested, no pesticides."
- Expiry Date: 2023-12-31
Test Steps:
1. Click the "+" button to add a product.
2. Fill in all fields with the provided test data.
3. Click the "Aggiungi" (Add) button.
Expected Result:
- Product is added to the system.
- `getNome()`, `getPrezzo()`, and `getScadenza()` return correct values.
- Notification is sent to customers subscribed to the seller (if applicable).

Title: Verify error handling for missing product fields
Test Data:
- Product Name: "" (empty)
- Category: "Vegetables"
- Price: 1.50
- Description: "Fresh carrots."
Test Steps:
1. Click the "+" button.
2. Leave the **Product Name** field empty but fill others.
3. Click the "Aggiungi" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays: "Product name is required."
- Product is **not** added.
- Form highlights the empty field.

Title: Verify successful product modification
Preconditions:
- A product exists (e.g., "Organic Apples" with price 2.99).
- Seller is logged in and clicks on the product.
Test Data:
- New Price: 3.49
- New Description: "Organic Apples - Limited Stock"
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Modifica" (Edit) button.
2. Update the **Price** and **Description** fields.
3. Click "Salva" (Save).
Expected Result:
- Product is updated in the system.
- `getPrezzo()` returns 3.49.
- `getDescrizione()` returns the new description.
- No error messages are displayed.

Title: Verify error handling for invalid product expiry date
Test Steps:
1. Click "Modifica" on an existing product.
2. Set the expiry date to a past date.
3. Click "Salva."
Expected Result:
- System displays: "Expiry date must be in the future."
- Product is **not** updated.
- Original expiry date remains unchanged.

Title: Verify successful review submission by a Customer
Preconditions:
- Customer is logged in.
- A product exists (e.g., "Organic Apples").
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click "Leave a Review."
3. Fill in the review fields.
4. Submit the review.
Expected Result:
- Review is associated with the **customer** and **product**.
- `getTitolo()` returns "Great Quality."
- `getVoto()` returns 5.
- Notification is sent to the seller (if enabled).

Title: Verify error handling for invalid review rating
Preconditions: - Customer is on the review submission page.
Test Steps:
1. Enter a title and description.
2. Set the rating to 7.
3. Submit the review.
Expected Result:
- System displays: "Rating must be between 1 and 5."
- Review is **not** submitted.
- Rating field is reset to default (e.g., 3).

Title: Verify successful report submission by a Customer
Preconditions:
- Customer is logged in.
- A seller/product exists to report.
Test Data:
- Title: "Suspicious Activity"
- Description: "Seller is selling expired products."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report submission page.
2. Select the seller/product.
3. Fill in the report fields.
4. Submit the report.
Expected Result:
- Report is associated with the **customer** and **seller**.
- `getTitolo()` returns "Suspicious Activity."
- Seller receives a notification (via `setNotifica()`).
- Report is logged in the system for moderation.

Title: Verify product list generation based on user position
Preconditions:
- Customer is logged in.
- GPS permissions are enabled.
Test Steps:
1. System displays a map.
2. User’s location is accessible (e.g., "Rome, Italy").
3. System checks position accessibility.
Expected Result:
- List of nearby products is generated.
- Products are filtered by proximity (e.g., within 5 km).
- No error messages are displayed.

Title: Verify error handling for inaccessible user position
Preconditions:
- Customer is logged in.
- GPS permissions are **disabled**.
Test Steps:
1. System attempts to access user location.
2. Location is inaccessible (e.g., GPS off or denied).
Expected Result:
- System displays: "Unable to access your location. Please enable GPS."
- No product list is generated.
- Error is logged (e.g., `Segnalazione errore`).

Title: Verify push notification toggle functionality
Preconditions:
- Customer is on the notification settings screen.
- Push notifications are currently **enabled**.
Test Steps:
1. Toggle the **Push Notification** switch to **off**.
2. Click "Save."
Expected Result:
- Push notifications are disabled for the user.
- `getNotifica()` for the user returns `false` for push.
- No push notifications are sent afterward (until re-enabled).

Title: Verify in-app notification delivery
Preconditions:
- Customer has enabled in-app notifications.
- A seller adds a new product.
Test Steps:
1. Seller adds a product (e.g., "New Seasonal Fruits").
2. System checks if the customer has subscribed to the seller.
3. In-app notification is triggered.
Expected Result:
- Notification appears in the customer’s app (e.g., banner or toast).
- Notification content includes: "New product from [Seller Name]."
- Notification is stored in `getNotifica()` as `NotificationType.IN_APP`.

Title: Verify adding a seller to favorites
Preconditions:
- Customer is browsing sellers.
- A seller (e.g., "GreenGrocer") is selected.
Test Steps: 1. Customer clicks the "Add to Favorites" button for "GreenGrocer."
Expected Result:
- Seller is added to `VenditorePreferito` list for the customer.
- Customer receives a confirmation (e.g., "Added to favorites!").
- Future notifications from this seller are prioritized.

Title: Verify shared attributes between Customer and Seller
Preconditions: - Both customer and seller accounts exist.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve `getEmail()` for a customer.
2. Retrieve `getEmail()` for a seller.
3. Attempt to call `setPassword()` on both.
Expected Result:
- Both return the correct email (shared attribute).
- `setPassword()` works for both roles.
- `isVenditore` is `false` for customer and `true` for seller.

Title: Verify system behavior with expired product
Preconditions: - A product exists with expiry date: "2023-01-01" (past).
Test Steps:
1. Seller attempts to modify the product.
2. Customer attempts to purchase the product.
Expected Result:
- Seller sees a warning: "This product is expired. Remove or update?"
- Product is **not** displayed in customer searches.
- System logs the expiry status for auditing.

Title: Verify password update functionality
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Current password: "OldPass123"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to "Change Password."
2. Enter current password, new password, and confirmation.
3. Submit changes.
Expected Result:
- Password is updated.
- `getPassword()` returns the hashed new password.
- User is logged out (security best practice).
